headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -49.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 122% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 110 quotes, including 84 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 64.2 sits in the lower-middle range historically but represents a significant spike from yesterday's 25.8.

• Optimism improved from yesterday's very low point but remains below average, while fears dropped notably despite having 12 strong-intensity quotes.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
